title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!
